description: Live, DB-backed, no-code-deploy delivery kill switch for governed Discord targets (best-bets, trader-insights, exclusive-insights), plus a fail-loud ops alert webhook health check.

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Bootstrap migration commit — last commit to touch non-proof paths (supabase/migrations/20260714130000_bootstrap_delivery_kill_switch_posture.sql, its down script, DELIVERY_KILL_SWITCH.md, and the extended proof test).

runtime_proof.note: database.types.ts regenerated for real against an applied migration on an isolated Supabase dev branch (created, migrated, typed, then deleted). Verified byte-identical output before/after.

receipts.note: Live Supabase smoke passed. database.types.ts regeneration used a temporary isolated dev branch, deleted after use, with no production writes. Two migrations WERE applied directly to production with PM sign-off (see verification.md rounds 2 and 3): the delivery_kill_switch table itself, and the bootstrap seed correcting the empty-table fail-closed risk this round addresses.

acceptance_criteria.no_change_to_discord_target_defaults: PASS — best-bets/trader-insights left at existing enabled:true default; flip explicitly deferred to a separate PM-gated follow-up
acceptance_criteria.bootstrap_migration_preserves_production: PASS — best-bets/trader-insights seeded killed=false, exclusive-insights seeded killed=true, derived from defaultTargetRegistry and verified live against production
acceptance_criteria.operators_can_engage_release_live: PASS — setKilled/isKilled round-trip proven against real Postgres on the safe fixture target
acceptance_criteria.unknown_targets_and_read_failures_remain: PASS — proven against real Postgres for a target with no row
